website.notes: Use App Router over Pages Router. Server components by default, client components only when needed.

api.hosting: Docker on Oracle Cloud free tier
api.notes: Always include /health endpoint. Validate env vars at startup.

mobile.notes: Prefer Expo managed workflow unless native modules are required.

cli.notes: Compile to single file with tsup for distribution.

general.testing: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
general.notes: Prefer established libraries over custom implementations. Fewer dependencies is better.
